title: UBA’s Ramon Nasir Bids Farewell to Mother in Ado-Odo Ogun State - FinancialEDGE
description: Ramon Nasir, Head of Media and External Relations at United Bank for Africa (UBA) Plc, at the weekend bids farewell to his mother in his hometown of Ado-Odo, Ogun State. The ceremony was attended by Odume Festus, Editorial/Project Director of Financial Edge, who came to pay his respects to the late matriarch.
html:
Ramon Nasir, Head of Media and External Relations at United Bank for Africa (UBA) Plc, at the weekend bids farewell to his mother in his hometown of Ado-Odo, Ogun State.

The ceremony was attended by Odume Festus, Editorial/Project Director of Financial Edge, who came to pay his respects to the late matriarch.
